articles.headline: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.6 Family: Sol, Terra & Luna
articles.subheadline: Limited preview released amid regulatory discussions
articles.summary: OpenAI announced a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol (frontier model), GPT-5.6 Terra (balanced/efficient), and GPT-5.6 Luna (fast and affordable).
articles.author: OpenAI

articles.headline: Anthropic Releases Claude 4 Opus with 2M Context
articles.subheadline: Massive context window now available in limited preview
articles.summary: Claude 4 Opus introduces a groundbreaking 2 million token context window.
articles.author: Anthropic

articles.headline: Google DeepMind Drops Gemini 3 Flash
articles.subheadline: Fastest frontier model yet with record efficiency
articles.summary: Gemini 3 Flash achieves 3x faster inference while matching previous flagship performance.
articles.author: Google DeepMind

articles.headline: xAI Announces Grok-3 with Real-Time Knowledge
articles.subheadline: Native integration with live X data and tools
articles.summary: Grok-3 brings significantly improved reasoning and native access to real-time information.
articles.author: xAI

articles.headline: Meta Open-Sources Llama 4 405B
articles.subheadline: Largest open model to date
articles.summary: Llama 4 405B is now fully open source under a permissive license.
articles.author: Meta AI

articles.headline: Claude Joins Slack as a Full Team Member
articles.subheadline: New 'Claude Tag' feature lets teams delegate tasks directly
articles.summary: Anthropic's Claude can now be added to Slack workspaces with access to specific channels and tools.
articles.author: Claude

articles.headline: Cursor 1.0 Launches with Agent Mode
articles.subheadline: Autonomous coding agent now available
articles.summary: Cursor 1.0 introduces a powerful agent that can plan, edit, and run code across entire repositories.
articles.author: Cursor

articles.headline: GitHub Copilot Workspace Goes Public
articles.subheadline: Full project planning and implementation
articles.summary: Copilot Workspace can now take a high-level task and turn it into a complete pull request.
articles.author: GitHub

articles.headline: Replit Agent 2.0 Can Build Full Apps
articles.subheadline: Autonomous app builder reaches new milestone
articles.summary: Replit's latest agent can create complete, deployable applications from natural language.
articles.author: Replit

articles.headline: Perplexity Launches Deep Research Mode
articles.subheadline: Multi-step research agent for complex queries
articles.summary: Deep Research Mode performs hours of research in minutes, delivering comprehensive reports.
articles.author: Perplexity

articles.headline: Alibaba's Qwen Launches AgentWorld Language Model
articles.subheadline: A new 'language world model' that simulates entire environments
articles.summary: The Qwen team introduced a language world model capable of natively simulating search, terminal, web, OS, and Android environments.
articles.author: Alibaba Qwen

articles.headline: Stanford Releases SWE-bench Verified
articles.subheadline: More rigorous software engineering benchmark
articles.summary: A cleaned and verified version of SWE-bench that better reflects real-world software engineering.
articles.author: Stanford

articles.headline: DeepMind Publishes AlphaFold 4 Paper
articles.subheadline: Major leap in protein structure prediction
articles.summary: AlphaFold 4 achieves near-atomic accuracy on previously unsolved protein complexes.
articles.author: Google DeepMind

articles.headline: MIT Shows LLMs Can Discover New Physics
articles.subheadline: AI identifies novel physical laws from data
articles.summary: Researchers demonstrate that large models can autonomously discover previously unknown physical relationships.
articles.author: MIT

articles.headline: Berkeley Open-Sources OpenDevin 2.0
articles.subheadline: Open platform for AI software agents
articles.summary: OpenDevin 2.0 provides a complete open-source framework for developing and evaluating software agents.
articles.author: Berkeley

articles.headline: Nous Research: Mixture-of-Agents Beats Frontier Models
articles.subheadline: Virtual models using MoA presets outperform Opus 4.8 & GPT-5.5
articles.summary: The Hermes Agent team demonstrated that clever orchestration of multiple specialized agents can surpass frontier models.
articles.author: Nous Research

articles.headline: AutoGPT 5.0 Achieves Full Autonomy
articles.subheadline: First fully autonomous agent system
articles.summary: AutoGPT 5.0 can now complete complex, multi-day tasks with minimal human supervision.
articles.author: AutoGPT

articles.headline: BabyAGI 3.0 Introduces Hierarchical Planning
articles.subheadline: Multi-level goal decomposition
articles.summary: BabyAGI 3.0 can break down high-level goals into detailed execution plans automatically.
articles.author: BabyAGI

articles.headline: MultiOn Raises $20M for Web Agents
articles.subheadline: AI agents that browse the web for you
articles.summary: MultiOn's agents can complete complex web tasks such as booking travel or shopping.
articles.author: MultiOn

articles.headline: Adept Fuyu-8B Powers Enterprise Agents
articles.subheadline: Specialized model for computer use
articles.summary: Adept's latest model excels at controlling computers and completing enterprise workflows.
articles.author: Adept

articles.headline: Massive Free AI Course Vault Shared on X
articles.subheadline: 70-119GB collections of paid courses on LLMs, agents & more
articles.summary: Popular accounts are distributing enormous Google Drive archives containing premium courses.
articles.author: Alex Moore

articles.headline: AI Twitter Spaces Hits 500k Listeners
articles.subheadline: Largest AI discussion event to date
articles.summary: A 12-hour Twitter Space on the future of agents drew over 500,000 live listeners.
articles.author: AI Twitter

articles.headline: r/MachineLearning Hits 5 Million Members
articles.subheadline: Reddit's premier AI community milestone

articles.summary: The Hugging Face Hub now hosts over one million open models and datasets.

articles.headline: AI Art Community Tops 10M on Discord
